supportLifecycle.surface: rest package and runtime HTTP contracts
supportLifecycle.supportWindow: current minor release line plus one minor release line after deprecation
supportLifecycle.sunsetTrigger: only after activeDeprecations records the replacement, coexistence window, release-note classification, validation gate, and rollback guidance
supportLifecycle.rollbackGuidance: pin the previous release and keep the old handler, JSON, or OpenAPI contract until the replacement passes local smoke tests

supportLifecycle.surface: core/governance and core/controlplane runtime JSON contracts
supportLifecycle.supportWindow: current minor release line plus one minor release line after deprecation
supportLifecycle.sunsetTrigger: only after the dashboard, control-plane contract tests, release notes, and activeDeprecations metadata identify the replacement and rollback path
supportLifecycle.rollbackGuidance: pin the previous release and keep the previous control-plane consumer until the new snapshot diff is accepted

supportLifecycle.surface: cmd/gofly JSON output consumed by CI, agents, and release automation
supportLifecycle.supportWindow: current minor release line plus one minor release line after deprecation
supportLifecycle.sunsetTrigger: only after CLI JSON golden tests, docs, release notes, activeDeprecations, and rollback guidance cover the field or command transition
supportLifecycle.rollbackGuidance: pin the previous CLI version or keep the old JSON field parser until the replacement field is observed in CI

supportLifecycle.surface: generated production service layout, OpenAPI fixtures, and production-check output
supportLifecycle.supportWindow: current minor release line plus one minor release line after deprecation
supportLifecycle.sunsetTrigger: only after generated compatibility fixtures, generated project smoke tests, release notes, activeDeprecations, and rollback notes prove the migration
supportLifecycle.rollbackGuidance: pin the generator version and regenerate from the previous profile until the new generated diff is classified and accepted

supportLifecycle.surface: rpc, gateway, and app packages while they advance from Tier 2 toward Tier 1
supportLifecycle.supportWindow: best-effort within the current minor release line until Tier 1 promotion evidence is complete
supportLifecycle.sunsetTrigger: promotion or removal requires rpc-boundary evidence, generated or example smoke tests, release notes, and rollback guidance
supportLifecycle.rollbackGuidance: keep the previous adapter, descriptor, or generated profile pinned until resolver, balancer, stream, and rollback evidence pass locally
